item.title: Long Beach congressman may get huge power to antagonize Trump if Democrats take midterms
item.description:
If Democrats take control of the House, Rep. Robert Garcia would be in line to lead its powerful Oversight Committee, which can pressure the Trump administration with investigative powers. Experts say that while victory is not guaranteed, a feasible path in the midterms is coming into focus, starting with today’s primaries. 

The post Long Beach congressman may get huge power to antagonize Trump if Democrats take midterms appeared first on Long Beach Post News.

item.title: Queen Mary may downsize, cut regular events to make room for amphitheater’s schedule
item.description:
The ship already hosts about 150 events a year, and with a slate of concerts coming to the amphitheater next door, there may not be enough parking or space aboard the ship to go around.

The post Queen Mary may downsize, cut regular events to make room for amphitheater’s schedule  appeared first on Long Beach Post News.
item.source:markdown:
![](https://img.lbpost.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2023/03/15150319/QUEEN-MARY_8543.jpg)
The ship already hosts about 150 events a year, and with a slate of concerts coming to the amphitheater next door, there may not be enough parking or space aboard the ship to go around.
The post [Queen Mary may downsize, cut regular events to make room for amphitheater’s schedule](https://lbpost.com/news/queen-mary-may-downsize-cut-regular-events-to-make-room-for-amphitheaters-schedule) appeared first on [Long Beach Post News](https://lbpost.com/news).

item.title: Long Beach wants supersized July 4 fireworks show with barges up and down its coast
item.description:

item.source:markdown:
